fields.label: Area Shape

log.why: Area shape is separate from range so self, point, line, wall, and emanation spells do not collapse together.

fields.label: Area Size Type

log.why: A size number can mean radius, diameter, edge, side, or length depending on the shape.
Large ward spells expose square-foot floor area separately from linear radius/diameter area facts.

fields.comment: Large ward spells expose square-foot floor area separately from linear radius/diameter area facts. It maps to `targeting.areaOfEffect.sizeType`. fields.pattern: ^Spatial Form \d+ (Label|Shape|Size Value|Size Type|Size Unit|Height Value|Height Unit|Width Value|Width Unit|Thickness Value|Thickness Unit|Segment Count|Segment Width Value|Segment Width Unit|Segment Height Value|Segment Height Unit|Notes)$
